groups.titleZh: COPR 模拟考试（300题中随机50题）
groups.descriptionEn: Designed to help PCP candidates practice COPR-style written exam thinking with 300-question bank and a random 50-question test each time.
groups.descriptionZh: 用于帮助 PCP 考生练习 COPR 风格 written exam 思维。题库共 300 题，每次随机抽 50 题。

questions.questionEn: A patient presents with noisy respirations and poor airway protection. What is the safest PCP-level priority?
questions.questionZh: 一名病人出现noisy respirations 和 poor airway protection。最安全的 PCP 级优先处理是什么？

options.zh: 优先保护气道并支持有效通气
options.en: Prioritize airway protection and effective ventilation support

options.zh: 先关注最不紧急的细节
options.en: Focus on the least urgent detail first

options.zh: 选择最高级但未必必要的选项
options.en: Choose the most advanced option even if unnecessary

options.zh: 等到完美诊断确认后再行动
options.en: Delay action until a perfect diagnosis is confirmed

questions.explanationEn: This item tests airway and ventilation using COPR-style safe PCP-level judgment. The best answer is the option that recognizes the most important risk and chooses the safest next PCP-level action.
questions.explanationZh: 这题在用 COPR 风格测试 Airway and Ventilation，重点是安全的 PCP 级判断。最佳答案永远是最能识别核心风险、并选出最安全 PCP 下一步的那个选项。
